more.title: War shockwaves hit Zimbabwe
more.description: Source: War shockwaves hit Zimbabwe – Bulawayo24 News Nearly all Zimbabwean businesses are feeling the effects of the escalating Israel–Iran conflict, with 99% reporting disruptions to their operations, according to a new survey by the Confederation of Zimbabwe Industries. more.title: Gas Without Gravity: How Structure, Politics, and Delay Are Holding Back Muzarabani’s Promise
more.description: THE discovery of hydrocarbons in Zimbabwe’s Cabora Bassa Basin, centred on the Muzarabani prospect and driven by Australian-listed Invictus Energy Limited, has been presented as a moment of national arrival. It is framed as geological vindication: proof that beneath Zimbabwe’s soil lies not only mineral wealth, but a viable energy future capable of reshaping the [...] The post Gas Without Gravity: How Structure, Politics, and Delay Are Holding Back Muzarabani’s Promise appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Chinese Miners Accused Of ‘Bulking’ Gold With Tungsten As Fidelity Buys US$10,000 Machines To Catch Scammers
more.description: Fidelity Forced To Buy US$10,000 Machines After Suspected Chinese Miners Flood Market With Tungsten-Infused Gold Government-owned Fidelity Gold Refineries (FGR) has reportedly been forced to purchase specialised machines after suspected Chinese miners allegedly flooded the market with tungsten-infused gold to increase weight and apparent purity, raising concerns over potential losses to national revenue. According to [...] The post Chinese Miners Accused Of ‘Bulking’ Gold With Tungsten As Fidelity Buys US$10,000 Machines To Catch Scammers appeared first on iHarare News .

more.title: From Data Scarcity to Data Sovereignty: How Zimbabwean Business Can Leapfrog into the AI Age
more.description: IN boardrooms across Harare, Bulawayo, and Victoria Falls, a quiet but consequential shift is underway. Decisions that were once shaped by instinct, experience, and fragmented reports are increasingly being driven by data, structured, unstructured, real-time, and predictive. What was once unknowable is now discoverable within minutes. The question is no longer whether Zimbabwean businesses should [...] The post From Data Scarcity to Data Sovereignty: How Zimbabwean Business Can Leapfrog into the AI Age appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: NPA Driver Murdered and Dumped in Lake Chivero: Was Shingirayi Chikosha Silenced for What He Knew About High-Profile Cases?
more.description: HARARE – The reeds at Lake Chivero have long whispered secrets that the Zimbabwean authorities would rather remain buried in the silt.
